business.name: Tallahassee Garage Door Service - Killearn Office

hero.headline: *Door broken?* We're already on our way
hero.subheadline: Same-day service with prices posted right on our site — no surprises, no waiting around.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Springs, tracks, openers — we handle it all
services_section.subheading: One truck, all the parts, same-day solutions

services.title: Spring Replacement
services.description: Torsion springs snapped? We carry the right springs and install them properly the first time.

services.title: Track Repair
services.description: Door came off track or bent rails causing problems? We straighten, realign, and get you moving.

services.title: Opener Service
services.description: Remote not working or motor acting up? We diagnose and fix garage door openers of all brands.

services.title: Door Adjustments
services.description: Squeaking, binding, or not closing properly? Complete tune-ups to get everything running smooth.

about.heading: Panama City garage door team
about.body: We post our prices online, show up when promised, and fix it right. Real people answering the phone.

reviews.name: Harley M.
reviews.text: Derek did a terrific job replacing our torsion springs. Prompt, professional, and worked after 5pm to fit our schedule. Great work, reasonable price.

reviews.name: Rachel S.
reviews.text: Chose them for the transparent pricing on their website, stayed for the phenomenal service. You can tell the owner really cares about his customers.

reviews.name: Tallyho M.
reviews.text: Door came off track Saturday night. Derek called Sunday and said he could swing by after another job. Showed up earlier than promised.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving the Panama City area
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the region

cta.heading: Door giving you trouble?
cta.body: Same-day service with upfront pricing. No hidden fees, no runaround — just honest garage door repair.
